original.product_summary: GPU upscaling and frame generation for macOS. An open-source native macOS application built with SwiftUI and Apple's Metal GPU framework that delivers upscaling and frame generation similar to DLSS/FSR tailored for Apple Silicon.

primary.product_summary: AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution (FSR) open-source upscaler SDK (cross-platform).

alternates.product_summary: Temporal upscaling (FSR2) reference implementation.

notes: Closest open-source upscaling tech; macOS Metal-specific successor not clearly established.

original.product_summary: Plugin bundle for OpenCode agent. An open-source plugin suite that layers curated subagents, asynchronous workflows, model integrations, and LSP/AST support atop the base OpenCode agent experience.

primary.product_summary: Batteries-included OpenCode plugin/harness with multi-agent orchestration and LSP/AST tooling.

alternates.product_summary: Curated list of OpenCode resources/plugins; helps find maintained successors.

notes: Direct spiritual successor in the OpenCode plugin ecosystem.

original.product_summary: AI Reflection on Hacker News History by Andrej Karpathy. Collects Hacker News threads from years past and analyzes them with large language models, letting you ask questions and get reflective summaries about how ideas and opinions have aged.

primary.product_summary: Karpathy’s HN time capsule project (correct repo).

notes: Original URL in dataset appears to be typo; this is the canonical repo.

original.product_summary: AI assistant with MCP tools for Excel. A Python project that builds an Excel MCP server and an AI agent runner so large language models can read, edit, and automate Excel files via structured tools and prompts.

primary.product_summary: MCP server for creating/reading/modifying Excel workbooks without Excel installed.

alternates.product_summary: Alternative Excel MCP server implementation (community).

notes: Matches “Excel MCP server” core; agent runner can be layered separately.

original.product_summary: POC for tracking device online status. Demonstrates how phone number delivery receipts and round-trip timing leaks can reveal whether a device is active, idle, or offline on platforms like WhatsApp or Signal.

primary.product_summary: PoC demonstrating delivery receipt + RTT timing leaks for device activity inference (WhatsApp/Signal).

alternates.product_summary: PoC implementation of “Careless Whisper” silent delivery receipt monitoring attack.

notes: Closest maintained PoCs aligned with the same research vector.

original.product_summary: AI web monitoring and alert platform. An open-source platform that lets you define Scouts (automated monitors) to search the web for keywords or conditions and send email alerts when matches occur.

primary.product_summary: Self-hosted website change detection with notifications (email, webhooks, etc.).

alternates.product_summary: Self-hosted monitoring/uptime + notifications; complements change detection.

notes: changedetection.io best match for keyword/page-change monitoring + email alerts.

original.product_summary: Rust embedded SQL database engine. An open-source embedded SQL database written in Rust focusing on simplicity, performance, and modern SQL engine patterns without external dependencies.

primary.product_summary: Modern embedded SQL database in pure Rust with ACID/MVCC ambitions.

alternates.product_summary: Ergonomic SQLite bindings for Rust (mature embedded SQL via SQLite).

notes: Closest ongoing successor to a Rust embedded SQL engine.

original.product_summary: Multi-LLM orchestration framework. An open-source project providing an orchestration layer over multiple large language models, letting you define pipelines, branching logic, and model strategies.

primary.product_summary: Graph-based agent/workflow orchestration for LLM applications.

notes: Closest widely-used open-source orchestration layer with branching/pipelines.

original.product_summary: Lightweight Agent Framework Foundation. A free open-source Python framework for building agents with flexible tool execution, context management, and modular skills.

primary.product_summary: Minimal agent framework focused on code/tool calling with small core.

notes: Spiritual successor in the “lightweight agent framework” category.

original.product_summary: Simple semantic memory for Claude Code. An open-source memory module designed specifically for Claude Code that stores and retrieves context with a focus on relevance and simplicity.

primary.product_summary: Claude Code memory plugin that captures/compresses sessions into reusable memory.

notes: Closest working memory add-on for Claude Code workflows.

original.product_summary: Enhanced ComfyUI web interface. An open-source web interface built atop local ComfyUI installation with richer browser GUI, workspace management, node search, presets, and UI workflows.

primary.product_summary: Extension to manage nodes/models and improve ComfyUI usability.

alternates.product_summary: Official front-end implementation of ComfyUI.

notes: Closest maintained way to enhance UX on top of ComfyUI.

original.product_summary: Detects RSC, Next.js, RCE vulnerabilities. An open-source Python CLI tool that tests Next.js apps using React Server Components for remote code execution weaknesses tied to recently disclosed CVEs.

primary.product_summary: CLI scanner for Next.js React Server Components RCE CVEs.

alternates.product_summary: Vercel remediation tool for vulnerable Next.js projects.

notes: Primary is the authoritative scanner.

original.product_summary: From papers to slides in one click. A free open-source Python-driven pipeline that reads PDFs, Word files, and markdown, builds a RAG-powered index, extracts key content and figures, and generates professional-grade visuals.

primary.product_summary: RAG-based pipeline to convert documents into professional slides/posters.

alternates.product_summary: Tool to convert arXiv papers into slides with LLMs.

notes: HKUDS is the closest “one-click” doc→slides pipeline.

original.product_summary: AI Storyboard to Video Generator. An open-source AI-assisted storyboard and video generation tool that turns your story idea into a full video sequence with intermediate transitions.

primary.product_summary: Open-source storyboard to video generation tool.

notes: Direct repo match found for the same product name.

original.product_summary: Quick Markdown Search - local markdown search engine. An open-source on-device search engine for markdown files combining BM25 full-text search with vector semantic search and optional LLM re-ranking.

primary.product_summary: Local hybrid search for Markdown/docs: BM25 + vectors + rerank.

alternates.product_summary: Obsidian plugin powered by QMD for local semantic/hybrid search.

notes: tobi/qmd appears to be the maintained canonical implementation.

original.product_summary: Adaptive Multi-Provider Prompt Optimizer. An open-source Python prompt optimization system that rewrites prompts to fit the idiosyncrasies of each LLM API you target.

primary.product_summary: Prompt optimization/adaptation system across providers.

notes: Closest repo matching the product identity.

original.product_summary: General Purpose AI Image Generator. An open-source AI image generation framework built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS connecting with multiple generative backends like Hugging Face, SD, and ModelScope.

notes: No verified replacement selected yet.

original.product_summary: Bilingual Image Generation Foundation Model. A foundation model by Meitu and Longcat team focusing on bilingual Chinese-English text-to-image generation with strong photo-realism at 6 billion parameters.

primary.product_summary: Bilingual Chinese-English image generation foundation model by Meituan LongCat.

alternates.product_summary: Open-source 6B image generation model family (incl. Turbo).

notes: LongCat-Image appears to exist as meituan-longcat/LongCat-Image.

original.product_summary: macOS iMessage and SMS CLI. A free open-source Go-based command line app that lets you send, receive, list, and live-stream Apple messages (iMessage and SMS) from your Mac.
feature_list: CLI for iMessage and SMS on macOS

primary.product_summary: CLI for macOS Messages.app to send/read/stream iMessage/SMS.

notes: Dataset repo differs; steipete/imsg appears canonical.

original.product_summary: Visual Prompt Library for AI Art. An open-source visual prompt management system with an intuitive web interface to organize, browse, edit, and search artistic prompts with visual previews.

notes: No verified replacement selected yet.

original.product_summary: AI Design Intelligence for UI-UX. An open-source AI skill providing a searchable database of UI styles, color palettes, font pairings, chart types, UX guidelines, and stack-specific best practices.
feature_list: Multi-framework support (HTML, Tailwind, React, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI)

primary.product_summary: Design intelligence skill/database for UI/UX guidance across stacks.

notes: Closest repo for this “skill” concept.

original.product_summary: Terminal Spreadsheet with Rich Features. A robust open-source CLI spreadsheet app written in Go using TUI library with 100+ built-in functions, rich formatting, multi-sheet workbooks, and support for XLSX, CSV, HTML, PDF.

primary.product_summary: Terminal spreadsheet app in Go with rich functions and formats.

notes: Closest matching terminal spreadsheet implementation.

original.product_summary: Raw Photo Color Grading Bridge. An open-source Python-based CLI utility that bridges raw photo files and cinematic lookup table color grading by converting raw data into wide gamut linear space.

primary.product_summary: Apply creative LUTs to RAW photos (bridge photo/video grading).

notes: Closest active repo for the same concept.

original.product_summary: macOS LLM Session Monitor. An open-source desktop app written in Rust with Tauri/React frontend that shows all active Claude Code Agent Sessions with real-time status, quick session focus, and global hotkey access.

primary.product_summary: Desktop app to monitor/manage multiple agent sessions.

alternates.product_summary: Alternative agent-sessions implementation/fork.

notes: Two similarly-named repos exist; jazzyalex appears prominent.

original.product_summary: Personal Research Knowledge Base. A free open-source personal research platform that ingests articles, extracts key insights, tracks references, and surfaces unexpected connections between ideas across domains.

primary.product_summary: Personal research library / zettelkasten-like ingestion + extraction.

notes: Closest repo found for “Jargon” research KB.

original.product_summary: Markdown Plus Diagrams, Math Editor. An open-source professional Markdown editor running in the browser with GitHub-flavored Markdown, Mermaid diagram support, and KaTeX math rendering.

primary.product_summary: Cross-platform open-source Markdown editor (preview-focused).

notes: Closest maintained Markdown editor; MarkX repo unclear/defunct.

original.product_summary: Local AI Song STEM Separator. An open-source AI-powered audio STEM separation app running locally with no subscriptions, using state-of-the-art models like Demucs and MDX-Net.

primary.product_summary: Local STEM separation app (Demucs/MDX-Net style separation).

notes: Direct replacement repo found.

original.product_summary: AI PDF Edit with Natural Language. An open-source CLI tool that lets you edit PDF slides and documents using natural language prompts powered by Google's Gemini 2.0 Pro model.

primary.product_summary: Natural-language PDF edits with image-rendering + model editing pipeline.

notes: Closest open-source NL PDF editing CLI.

original.product_summary: High-speed text to image server. A free open-source web app with React + FastAPI stack that runs Alibaba 6B parameter Z-Image model locally to generate images from text prompts with snappy performance.

primary.product_summary: Open-source Z-Image model family; local generation.

alternates.product_summary: Server/MCP tooling around Z-Image Turbo.

notes: Model + server ecosystem rather than a single monorepo app.

original.product_summary: Browser AI translation extension. An open-source browser extension that lets you select text and translate it on the spot using multiple AI providers like OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and OpenRouter.

notes: No verified replacement selected yet.

original.product_summary: Decentralized AI compute by Telegram. An open-source initiative built on TON blockchain creating a decentralized AI inference marketplace with hardware trusted execution environments.

primary.product_summary: COCOON confidential compute network for decentralized AI inference on TON.

notes: Dataset’s ton-blockchain/cocoon seems outdated; TelegramMessenger/cocoon is current.

original.product_summary: Remote Multiplatform AI Coding Control. A free open-source system that lets developers control AI coding assistance like Claude Code or Codex from platforms like Telegram or GitHub with persistent sessions.

primary.product_summary: Remote control system for AI coding agents via Telegram/GitHub/etc.

notes: Matches the described feature set.

original.product_summary: Interactive Architecture Diagrams. An open-source web app that helps developers and architects draw, modify, and share system diagrams using an interactive canvas.

notes: No verified replacement selected yet.

original.product_summary: Reference payment system design. An open-source Java reference implementation showing how instant payment systems like RTP, SEPA Instant, FedNow, and UPI can be built with ISO 20022 native data models.

notes: No verified replacement selected yet.

original.product_summary: Docker-first RAG server. An open-source Docker-powered RAG stack combining Docling document extraction, ChromaDB vector storage, and Llama Index retrieval pipelines with a lightweight UI and API.

primary.product_summary: Docker-powered RAG stack for code+docs with API/UI.

alternates.product_summary: Starter stack for self-hosted AI tooling; broader than KB kit.

notes: Closest match is 2dogsandanerd repo.

original.product_summary: LLM prompt runner from your shell. An open-source command line utility that lets you execute .prompt files directly from your shell and receive structured responses back.

original.product_summary: Customizable Browser Start Page. An open-source customizable start page for browsers offering stunning themes, clock with light/dark modes, smart search shortcuts, weather integration, and personalized quick links.

primary.product_summary: Minimalist customizable startpage/new tab replacement.

alternates.product_summary: Highly customizable startpage/new tab page with themes and widgets.

notes: Bonjourr is popular and aligns closely; Sip-StartPage is close to the original name.

original.product_summary: WebUI download manager for Anna's Archive. An open-source containerized download queue manager with a WebUI to queue books, manage downloads, and monitor progress with automatic fallback to mirrors.

primary.product_summary: Web UI for aria2 download manager (general-purpose, legal/neutral).

alternates.product_summary: Multi-protocol CLI download utility; backend for many WebUIs.

original.product_summary: Cinematic Code History View. An open-source web app that transforms your GitHub or GitLab activity into a cinematic story-style timeline with smooth visual slides.

primary.product_summary: Cinematic story-style visualization of GitHub/GitLab activity.

original.product_summary: Zero dependency HTML5 parser in JavaScript. A pure JavaScript port of the minimalist HTML5 parser aiming to pass the full HTML5 test suite with no dependencies.

original.product_summary: Terminal First Markdown Research Tool. An open-source lightweight markdown research tool built in Rust that channels the feel of Obsidian into your shell for distraction-free note-taking.

primary.product_summary: Terminal-first markdown research tool.

original.product_summary: Local-first personal AI assistant. A personal AI assistant that lives on your own machines and talks to you on WhatsApp, Telegram, WebChat, and Native Apps.

original.product_summary: Self-hosted STL to Step Converter. A self-hosted web app that converts STL mesh files into solid STEP format on your own hardware using FreeCAD running headless inside Docker.
